title: hieracium senile
intro: Hieracium senile, also known as old man's hay or fox and cubs, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium, which is a type of weed. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been reported to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The medicinal properties of Hieracium senile have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium senile can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support the immune system and reduce inflammation.
